author: alex
content: Falcon is claiming the staging cluster for our 48h soak starting this Friday 08:00. We need these metrics for the board dashboard. @Sam, let me know if Raven has a hard blocker, otherwise we're locking this in.

author: jordan
content: Agreed with @alex. We need that Friday slot to validate the API hardening under load. If we slip, we risk the partner spike deadline. @sam, can we confirm the handoff by Thursday EOD?

author: sam
content: @alex @jordan Raven has a hard blocker. We need that weekend window for the regulatory soak; without it, the compliance evidence pack (R1) fails the audit. We can't let partner spikes trump legal requirements.

author: sam
content: I'm escalating this to the PMs if we can't find a compromise. Raven is taking the slot Friday 08:00 unless we can split the window 24/24.

author: riley
content: A 24/24 split might not give either team enough soak time for 'green' confidence. @alex @sam—can we run Falcon's API hardening first for 24h, then hand over to Raven for the compliance run? If we prep the environment state ahead of time, we might save 6-8 hours on the transition.

author: alex
content: @sam @riley 24h isn't a 'soak,' it's a smoke test. Falcon needs the full 48h to hit the 'green' performance threshold for the board. If Raven takes the weekend, we need the cluster starting Wednesday 08:00 to clear out by Friday. Can Raven prep their environment while we run?

author: jordan
content: @alex @sam Moving to Wednesday 08:00 works for Falcon, but it means I need to lock my API hardening branch by tonight. @sam, if we vacate by Friday morning, can your team be ready to spin up immediately to maximize your weekend window?

author: sam
content: @alex @jordan If Falcon takes Wed-Fri, Raven will take the cluster Friday 09:00 sharp through Sunday. We'll be ready to spin up immediately. This is the only way to ensure the regulatory soak hits the required duration for the audit pack.

author: sam
content: @riley Let's focus on R1 prep so we don't waste a single minute of that Friday handover. If the platform on-call isn't available for the switch, we'll need to escalate for coverage.

author: riley
content: @sam @alex @jordan Glad we have a tentative schedule. I'll make sure R2 is merged so it's in the Friday soak. @alex, who is the platform on-call for that Friday 09:00 handoff? We should sync with them now to avoid a 'ghost town' transition.

author: alex
content: Confirmed. Falcon takes Wed 08:00 to Fri 08:00. @sam, the cluster is yours at 09:00 Friday. I'll check the on-call schedule now; if it's thin, we might need to self-serve the teardown/setup to keep the momentum.

author: jordan
content: @alex @riley I'm heads down on F2 to meet the tonight branch lock. @sam, we'll ensure the environment is clean for you by 08:00 Friday. If platform on-call is MIA, let's have a shared SOP for the handoff so we don't bleed time.

author: sam
content: @alex @jordan Copy that. Raven is locked for Friday 09:00. @riley and I are drafting a quick handoff SOP now to bypass any platform on-call delays. We can't afford a 'ghost town' transition.

author: riley
content: @alex @jordan Sounds like a plan. I'll take point on the handoff SOP for Raven's side. If we can get a list of the specific teardown steps Falcon usually runs, we can script as much as possible to hit that 09:00 start.

author: alex
content: @sam @riley Here is the teardown manifest we use for Falcon. It’s mostly automated, but watch the DB connection pool—it tends to hang if not force-killed. We are on track for the Wed 08:00 start.

author: jordan
content: Manifest received, @alex. I'm focusing on F2 now to ensure we're ready for the 08:00 kick-off tomorrow. @riley, I'll add a note to the SOP about the DB pool force-kill just in case.

author: sam
content: @alex Thanks for the manifest. @riley let's integrate that DB force-kill into our automation immediately. I'm going to flag the PMs that we have a solid plan, but any platform instability on Friday will be an immediate escalation.

author: riley
content: @alex @jordan Thanks for the manifest. I've added the DB force-kill step to our Friday 09:00 automation. @sam, I'm heads down on R2 now to make sure those billing fixes are in the build.

author: alex
content: @jordan @sam Falcon is green for the 08:00 kickoff tomorrow. I've finished the metrics wiring for F1 so the dashboard will be live for the board view. @sam, just a heads up—I'm still not seeing a confirmed platform name for the Friday handoff. We should assume we're on our own for the transition.

author: jordan
content: @alex @sam F2 hardening is merged. Falcon is ready for the 08:00 start tomorrow. I'll stay online for the first hour of the soak to monitor the initial load. @riley, I've verified the DB force-kill script works on my end.

author: sam
content: @alex @jordan Copy that. If platform is a no-show Friday, I'll handle the escalation to ensure we aren't penalized for their lack of coverage. Raven is prepping R1 now to be ready the second the cluster clears.

author: sam
content: @riley Great work on the scripts. Let's finish R2 and R1 prep today. I want zero 'discovery' tasks left when we hit that 09:00 window.

author: riley
content: @sam R2 is in final testing; I'll have it merged by EOD. @jordan @alex Glad the DB script is verified. We'll be ready to take the keys Friday morning regardless of platform presence.

author: alex
content: Falcon soak is LIVE as of 08:00. F1 dashboard is reporting green. @sam @riley, we’ll keep you posted if we see any resource creep that might impact your Friday start.

author: jordan
content: @alex Metrics look stable on the F1 dashboard. I've been watching the API response times and the F2 hardening is keeping things within the 99th percentile even as load ramps up. @sam @riley, no resource creep yet; I'll keep an eye on the memory footprint overnight.

author: sam
content: @jordan @alex Good to see the green metrics. We are tracking R1/R2 completion today. I've already alerted the directors that we are taking the cluster at 09:00 Friday regardless of platform coverage. Keep that DB force-kill script handy.

author: riley
content: @alex @jordan Glad to hear the metrics are holding steady. @sam, R2 is in the final PR review now. I'll have it merged and ready for the Friday build shortly.
